subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Thy petition hath gained admission to the Most Holy Court. Praise be to God, from the luminous wine of utterance hath the purpose been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی عریضه ات بساحت اقدس فائز لله الحمد از رحیق منیر بیان مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
